subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: They come from other minds: they are reflected. One should not become a mirror for them--to reflect them, neither should one try to control them
subcodes.subjects: @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @spiritual transformation, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
